Custom.description: Generates anything based on customized input and instruction.
Custom.interface: custom(input: str, instruction: str) -> dict with key 'response' of type str

AnswerGenerate.description: Generates a step-by-step thought process and a final answer for the given input.
AnswerGenerate.interface: answer_generate(input: str) -> dict with keys 'thought' of type str and 'answer' of type str

ScEnsemble.description: Uses self-consistency to select the solution that appears most frequently in the solution list.
ScEnsemble.interface: sc_ensemble(solutions: List[str], problem: str) -> dict with key 'response' of type str
